betterquesting:10.desc:8:
Things may be getting a bit dangerous, but my confidence in the material properties of Defined matter are incredible.
Not only I can isolate a highly energetic object, I can do it with dense objects, even infinitely dense ones.
I can make my own black hole; a small one, but one where I can place machinery directly at the boundary of the event horizon.
The incredibly tidal forces induce a strange phase change; controlled spaghettification.
I cannot lie, I am not quite sure if I even possess a use for such a phenomenon, other than scientific tests.
In no small part, this is a work of pride. I have to admit that. It was an act of powerful magic that originated the singularity of Dynatos, and its existence made me quite curious. I wanted to know how far I could push the capabilities of Sedanite and Defined Matter.
This is my largest technical achievement, and it may very well be the most advanced  technology I will ever develop.
And now, to find a use for it...
